releases.label: PDR1
releases.summary: First public data release of VIPERS (ESO Large Programme 182.A-0886, VIMOS on the VLT): 57,204 spectroscopic measurements (54,756 galaxies/AGN, 2,448 stars) of i_AB < 22.5, colour-preselected z > 0.5 targets in the CFHTLS W1 and W4 fields (effective areas 5.347 + 4.968 deg2). Redshift catalogue released 2013-10-04; 1D spectra followed 2014-10-03. Superseded by PDR2.

releases.label: PDR2
releases.summary: Second and final VIPERS data release: 91,507 spectroscopic measurements and 1D spectra (86,775 galaxies, 2,247 stars) from 288 VIMOS pointings over ~23.5 deg2 of the CFHTLS W1 and W4 fields (16.3 deg2 effective), with quality flags, TSR/SSR sampling rates and selection flags; redshift accuracy sigma_z = 0.00054(1+z), 88% of galaxies with reliable flags >= 2. Published via ESO Phase 3 on 2016-12-15 (the vipers.inaf.it PDR-2 pages have since regressed; the ESO archive is the reliable long-term host). Reference paper Scodeggio et al. 2018.
